caption: A person with blonde hair wearing a dark blue shirt and a gaming headset is visible in a small picture-in-picture window in the bottom-left corner of the screen, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The main view shows a virtual room with wooden floors, a dark shelf filled with gold trophies, and a large, gold-trimmed pedestal in the center. The text "SMALL PRESENT" is displayed in the upper left, and several numbers, including "179,037", "14,600", and "2,343,543", appear in the upper right alongside "LV 19 (90)". A stylized "UT" logo is visible in multiple locations across the top of the scene. Across the sequence, a glowing gold and silver card with a large "Z" shape gradually animates and reveals itself on the central pedestal. The person in the small window continues to react and gesture as the card's visual effects transition from a golden glow to a bright, shimmering silver finish.
